entity.summary: Permissionless automated-market-maker protocol and decentralized trading infrastructure focused on concentrated liquidity, gas-efficient swaps, and extensible pool design.
entity.notes: HEI models Ekubo and the Ethereum V3 discovery row as one entity rather than separate chain/version entities. Current first-party documentation describes open, permissionless AMM infrastructure, concentrated-liquidity pools, on-chain swaps, and Starknet/EVM router implementations.

evidence.title: Ekubo Protocol Introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Ekubo as open-source, permissionless AMM infrastructure with concentrated liquidity, singleton architecture, flash accounting, and extensions.

evidence.title: Ekubo Protocol Features
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes active concentrated-liquidity, gas-efficiency, extensions, and deployment architecture.

evidence.title: Ekubo Swapping integration guide
evidence.notes: First-party swapping guide documents on-chain swap execution and links Starknet and EVM router implementations.
